title: whatsapp_conversations
description: Groups WhatsApp messages by supplier phone using a session window

supplier_name.description: Name of the supplier if registered

offer_draft_id.description: Reference to the offers.id created from this conversation

last_message_at.description: Timestamp of the last message in the conversation

message_count.description: Number of messages in the conversation

ai_analysis.description: JSON string with AI analysis results

window_closed.description: Whether the conversation window has closed
